analysis: Hybrid Semantic-Cartesian Positional Encodings (HSC-PE) successfully improved over the baseline. The validation loss decreased from 1.6160 (baseline) to 1.5573. By directly fusing explicit 3D sinusoidal Cartesian PE with map-derived semantic distance transforms (distance to drivable area, lane centers, and intersections), the model successfully anchored vehicle bounding boxes to road topologies while maintaining pure Cartesian reasoning for off-road/unconstrained classes. This validates the core hypothesis of leveraging semantic coordinate spaces as structural priors.
